memoryAudit.method: same-session baseline heap usage -> 3 scroll/nav/wait cycles -> forced Runtime.gc/HeapProfiler.collectGarbage after each cycle -> final heap snapshot summary

principles.summary: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed; Animations present; reduced-motion not verified

findings.title: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed
findings.evidence: computed root colorScheme='normal'; dark condition not separately captured in this batch.

principles.summary: Pending active keyboard/focus/input-modality test; screenshot/DOM evidence is not treated as a pass.
Pending active wayfinding/search/menu-flow test; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.

findings.title: Substantial page chrome/network noise
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 177 requests; script hosts include www.googletagmanager.com, www.gstatic.com, www.google.com, open.spotifycdn.com, cdn.cookielaw.org.

principles.summary: Primary homepage entry point rendered; task completion flow not exercised.
CLS above good threshold (0.66); LCP above good threshold (25.2s); CLS above good threshold (0.66)

findings.title: LCP above good threshold (25.2s)
findings.suggestedFix: Improve LCP by prioritizing the hero/content resource, reducing render-blocking work, and optimizing server/critical CSS delivery.

findings.title: CLS above good threshold (0.66)
findings.suggestedFix: Reserve space for late-loading media/ads and avoid inserting content above existing content after render.

principles.summary: axe found 7 violation groups; Unnamed controls or links detected

findings.title: axe found 7 violation groups
findings.evidence: axe violations: aria-required-children(critical,2 nodes), aria-required-parent(critical,54 nodes), aria-roles(critical,54 nodes), heading-order(moderate,1 nodes), meta-viewport(critical,1 nodes), presentation-role-conflict(minor,54 nodes), region(moderate,2 nodes)

principles.summary: Basic metadata/viewport probes passed; Lighthouse not run in this scale batch. Lighthouse best-practices evidence is pending for this site.
Pending active no-JS/offline/reload resilience test; manifest/service-worker presence alone is not treated as a pass.
html lang='en-GB'; deeper locale flows not tested.
Pending active consent/account/commerce-flow review for dark patterns; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
Heavy transfer on initial load (4.7 MB)

findings.title: Heavy transfer on initial load (4.7 MB)
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 177 requests and 4738235 transferred bytes.

principles.summary: Same-session memory pass retained -0.3 MB after interaction cycles and forced GC; no monotonic leak signal above threshold.

verdict: Homepage batch: 9 principles with issues; top concerns: high be-fast-and-stable: CLS above good threshold (0.66); high adapt-to-the-form-factor: Mobile viewport has horizontal overflow; medium be-discoverable: Low non-JS discoverability (36%).
_caveats: Scale batch: no Lighthouse, LCP or INP in this pass; coordinator CDP data should fill objective metrics.
Memory is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
Memory principle pending rigorous same-session recheck; no pass/issue asserted from single/coarse heap snapshots.
Passive-only principles patched: trustworthy/resilient/natural-interactions/guided-navigation require active flow testing and are not counted as passes.

Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion video were not collected in the original batch; future batches include them and this site needs supplemental evidence for high-confidence performance/reduced-motion claims.
Supplemental Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion evidence collected and merged.
Memory was rechecked with same-session baseline, 3 interaction cycles, forced GC, and final heap snapshot; still a homepage smoke test, not full memlab trace attribution.
